case_title: BROUSSARD, SHIRLEY vs. GEORGE, PAMELA et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GEORGE, PAMELA BUTTREY, KENNETH

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROUSSARD, SHIRLEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEORGE, PAMELA BUTTREY, KENNETH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 917 FOLSOM ST #308, LEASE FORFEITED

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT GEORGE, PAMELA BUTTREY, KENNETH
